searches.query: EU membership Europe remain leave Brexit referendum

variable.name: EUVOTWHO
variable.label: Did you vote to ‘remain a member of the EU’ or to ‘leave the EU’?

valueLabels.label: Remain a member of the European Union

variable.name: EURefb
variable.label: If you were given the chance to vote again, how would you vote - to remain a member of the EU, to leave the EU, or would you not vote?

valueLabels.label: Remain a member of the European Union

variable.name: ECPolicy2
variable.label: Leaving aside the result of the referendum, what should Britain's policy towards the EU be

valueLabels.label: stay in the EU and try to reduce the EU s powers,
stay in the EU and try to keep the EU s powers as they are,
stay in the EU and try to increase the EU s powers,
or, work for the formation of a single European government?

variable.name: EULtop1
variable.label: After Britain leaves the EU, which if any of the following should be the top priority of the government?

valueLabels.label: Improving public services such as schools and hospitals
Reducing the number of people on low incomes
Keeping prices in the shops low

variable.name: EULtop2
variable.label: After Britain leaves the EU, which if any of the following should be the second priority of the government?

valueLabels.label: Improving public services such as schools and hospitals
Reducing the number of people on low incomes
Keeping prices in the shops low

variable.name: EULtop3
variable.label: After Britain leaves the EU, which if any of the following should be the third priority of the government?

valueLabels.label: Improving public services such as schools and hospitals
Reducing the number of people on low incomes
Keeping prices in the shops low

variable.name: EUExUne2
variable.label: As a result of leaving the EU will unemployment in Britain be higher, lower, or won't it make much difference?

variable.name: eulunem
variable.label: Do you think that as a result of leaving the EU, unemployment in Britain will be higher in 10 years’ time, lower, or won’t it make much difference?

variable.name: ImpHSafe
variable.label: How large an impact, if any, on someone's health: how safe someone feels in their local area?

variable.name: NHSImp
variable.label: If demand for NHS services exceeds the amount of funding it receives, what is the most important thing for the NHS to do?

valueLabels.label: Stop providing treatments that are poor value for money
Raise the threshold for treatment to qualify for NHS care
Delay treatments so people have to wait longer

variable.name: consvfa
variable.label: Is the Conservative party IN FAVOUR or AGAINST allowing people from the EU to come here freely to live and work in return for allowing British firms to sell goods and services freely in the EU?

variable.name: labrfa
variable.label: Is the Labour party IN FAVOUR or AGAINST allowing people from the EU to come here freely to live and work in return for allowing British firms to sell goods and services freely in the EU?

variable.name: ukipfa
variable.label: Is UKIP IN FAVOUR or AGAINST allowing people from the EU to come here freely to live and work in return for allowing British firms to sell goods and services freely in the EU?

variable.name: InpatSat
variable.label: How satisfied or dissatisfied you are with National Health Service: being in hospital as an in -patient?

variable.name: MedResI
variable.label: How interested, if at all, would you say you are in medical research?

variable.name: SocSpnd1
variable.label: Would you like to see more or less government spending than now on benefits for unemployed people

variable.name: Himp
variable.label: How important it is for a young person to go on to a university or college?

valueLabels.label: SPONTANEOUS: It depends on the young person wants
SPONTANEOUS: It depends on the career that the young person
SPONTANEOUS: It depends how the young person will fund their higher education
SPONTANEOUS: It depends what the young person`s motivations are

variable.name: GovTrust
variable.label: How much do you trust British governments of any party to place the needs of the nation above the interests of their own political party

variable.name: WhyNRep3
variable.label: Why not likely to report  benefit fraud: I would worry that they would find out it was me who reported them

variable.name: WhyNRep5
variable.label: Why not likely to report  benefit fraud: Nothing would happen as a result of me reporting it

variable.name: WhyNRep8
variable.label: Why not likely to report  benefit fraud: I don't care / it doesn't bother me

variable.name: CycDang
variable.label: It is too dangerous for me to cycle on the roads.

variable.name: acgoals
variable.label: It is easy for me to accomplish my goals.

variable.name: VoteSyst
variable.label: Should we change or keep the voting system for general elections?

valueLabels.label: Change voting system for House of Commons

variable.name: SocSpnd6
variable.label: Would you like to see more or less government spending than now on benefits for people who care for those who are sick or disabled

variable.name: Buldres
variable.label: Assuming a decision had been made to build new houses in your local area, who should be mainly responsible for deciding where new homes are built?

valueLabels.label: (Spontaneous - I don`t think housing should be built in my local area)

variable.name: WRKCON
variable.label: How confident are you that you will be working in 12 months  time?

valueLabels.label: (SPONTANEOUS: Plan to be retired/not in work within 12 month

variable.name: ChgJbTim
variable.label: What is the maximum time you would be willing to spend on your daily trip from home to a new job?

valueLabels.label: (SPONTANEOUS: I would not be willing to travel at all)

variable.name: govldif
variable.label: It is the responsibility of the government to reduce the differences in income between people with high incomes and those with low incomes.

variable.name: morewelf
variable.label: The government should spend more money on welfare benefits for the poor

variable.name: Monarchy
variable.label: How important is it for Britain to have a monarchy?

valueLabels.label: or, do you think the monarchy should be abolished?

variable.name: Spend1
variable.label: Which would be your highest priority for extra govt spending?
